title: lactuca scariola subsp. augustanae
intro: Lactuca scariola subsp. augustanae, also known as Wild Lettuce or Prickly Lettuce, is a subspecies of the Lactuca scariola plant, native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, which are attributed to its sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Lactuca scariola subsp. augustanae include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and promote restful sleep. Herbal preparations of Wild Lettuce can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for various medicinal purposes.
